text.title: Kill Or Keep Criteria Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying Kill Or Keep Criteria. Each step lists input, action, and output. Pause and surface the artefact when output is produced.

step.name: snapshot-inputs
step.action: Pull current values, attach URLs as evidence.

step.name: score-four-floors
step.action: Score each of the four floors as pass/fail vs threshold.

step.name: compare-opportunity-cost
step.action: Compare keep-cost to candidate-bet ROI; cite numbers.

step.name: synthesise-verdict
step.action: Apply rule: ≥2 floors failed OR opportunity_cost positive → kill.

decision-gate.p: After step 4, the artefact MUST satisfy the output contract in content/02-output-contract.xml before downstream consumers read it.
